🔐 Admin Settings

Change Admin Settings — control what users are allowed to do

Billing
Allow to change bill number
Allow to change rate while billing (Long press entry)
Allow to compute change
Billing: Allow customer to pay amount in advance
Allow to make bill at custom date and time
Allow to discard bill
Allow to edit / delete bill
Allow to reprint bill
Use Plain / PDF text for printing data (Untick if using non-english language)
Do not stop billing for low stock quantity. Instead, let the stock go negative (If using stock quantity)
Products
Show product units (kg, pcs, L, etc.) on product cards and receipts
Auto generate Item Code while adding products (If code type must be integer)
Any user can update products data
Any user can update customer data
Any user can update thermal printer templates
Any user can add expense
Any user can import CSV
Numbering
First bill number must start from 1 everyday

Threshold 128
🖨️ Thermal Printing: Images are auto-converted to 1-bit monochrome bitmap for ESC/POS compatibility. Width is capped at 384px (58mm) or 576px (80mm). Dithering improves photo/gradient reproduction at the cost of slightly larger data.

👥 User Management
➕ Add User
⚠️
ችግር ተፈጥሯል
App ሲጀምር ስህተት ተፈጥሯል።
ኢንተርኔት ያረጋግጡ ወይም ዳግም ይሞክሩ።
🗂 Manage Categories
📷 Barcode Scanner
📷 Camera እየጠበቀ ነው...
🔒 Camera ፍቃድ አልተሰጠም
⚠️ ፋይሉ በቀጥታ ከ Downloads ተከፍቷል — browser camera permission content:// ፋይሎች ላይ አይፈቅድም።

መፍትሄ — አንዱን ይምረጡ፦
A
Termux ወይም Simple HTTP Server app ተጠቀሙ — localhost ላይ file ያስኬዱ
B
ፋይሉን Google Drive / Dropbox ውስጥ ያስቀምጡና browser ላይ ይክፈቱ
C
PC ወይም laptop ላይ ካለ server ካለ — http:// አድራሻ ተጠቀሙ
1
Browser address bar ላይ ያለውን 🔒 ወይም ⓘ icon ይጫኑ
2
Camera → Allow (ይፍቀዱ) ይምረጡ
3
ገጹን refresh አድርጉ ወይም "🔄 እንደገና ሞክር" ይጫኑ
— ወይም barcode ቁጥሩን ከታች manually ያስገቡ —
📦
